d`dmdad
dcddded
Library that exposes various tables found in the StringPrep RFC 3454.
There are two kinds of tables: sets, for which a member test is provided,
and mappings, for which a mapping function is provided.
	ucd_3_2_0z
3.2.0c
unicodedata
category
code
"/usr/lib64/python3.9/stringprep.py
in_table_a1
b1_set
in_table_b1
telZ
hpaZ
khzZ
mhzZ
ghzZ
thzZ
kpaZ
mpaZ
gpaZ
co.Z
ppmZ
ffiZ
b3_exceptions
getr
lower)
map_table_b3
NFKC
<listcomp>
z map_table_b2.<locals>.<listcomp>)
	normalize
join)
alr#
map_table_b2
in_table_c11
ZsrE

in_table_c11_c12
